summary: Iteration 2 testing for GlowCare new features: AI model switch to Claude 4 Sonnet, profile settings page, and history filter/sort. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified via Playwright: settings page, model selection, save flow, history filter/sort/reset, profile gear icon navigation. Minor stale comment issue in server.py noted.

minor.issue: Stale comment in _safe_llm_call says 'Try preferred Doubao provider first' but now uses anthropic/claude as preferred. LiteLLM logs show 'provider = openai' for claude-4-sonnet calls — this is because emergentintegrations routes anthropic via an OpenAI-compatible endpoint internally. The health endpoint and code correctly report 'anthropic' as preferred_model.

integration_issues.issue: Alert.alert('已保存') fires correctly and settings are persisted to DB, but the native browser alert is dismissed before Playwright can capture it. Functionally working - the dirty state resets to false after save confirming success.

action_items: Optional: Update stale comment in server.py _safe_llm_call line 111 from 'Try preferred Doubao provider first' to 'Try preferred Anthropic/Claude provider first'

Note: demo-user-123 was manually inserted into MongoDB for settings API testing. Consider adding an endpoint or initialization mechanism to create a user with a specific ID, since POST /api/users generates a random UUID and the app hardcodes demo-user-123 in multiple places
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 111: Stale docstring still mentions 'Doubao' — should say 'anthropic/claude'

UserCreate model has no id field, so POST /api/users always generates UUID; but frontend hardcodes DEMO_USER_ID='demo-user-123' in settings.tsx and history.tsx, meaning demo-user-123 must be pre-seeded. The initializeUser() in index.tsx creates a NEW random user each time, not demo-user-123. This works in demo mode since demo-user-123 was seeded, but is a latent inconsistency.

success_rate.backend: 100% (29/29 tests passed across both test files)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all tested flows working: settings page, model selection, save, history filter/sort/reset, profile gear icon navigation)

seed_data_creation: Inserted demo-user-123 directly into MongoDB (the POST /api/users endpoint generates random UUIDs and cannot create users with specific IDs)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified working: (1) Claude 4 Sonnet confirmed as preferred model via health endpoint (anthropic/claude-4-sonnet-20250514) and LLM calls use claude-4-sonnet-20250514; (2) GET/PUT /api/users/demo-user-123/settings fully tested - all fields, 404 for nonexistent users, persistence verified; (3) /profile/settings page loads with 4 AI model options, sliders, language toggle, reminder switch, save button appears on dirty state; (4) /conversations/history filter panel works - emotion chips, crisis filter (高风险≥3 reduces from 16 to 2 items), sort options, reset button; (5) /profile gear icon navigates to /profile/settings. LiteLLM logs show 'provider = openai' for claude calls - this is emergentintegrations internal behavior, not a bug.
rca_of_issue: No critical bugs found. The 1 test failure during full suite run was due to test state pollution (UI test changed model to gpt-5.2 before settings default test ran). Fixed by adding PUT reset step in the test before asserting defaults.
